steps.title: Identify the decisive clue
steps.content: The goal explicitly requires the student to provide an EXAMPLE of a NICKNAME. This means the effective answer must name a specific nickname, not discuss nicknames in general.

steps.title: Apply the clue to the choices
steps.content: The matching choice provides the specific nickname “Sue” for a Tyrannosaurus fossil specimen at the Field Museum of Natural History in Chicago, Illinois. The other three choices lack a specific nickname example. A is correct.
